label: Letter
description: Defines a letter type that appears in the message pane. Controls the display color, flash behavior, icon, sound, and automatic pause behavior.

letterClass.label: Letter class
letterClass.description: C# class that implements the letter behavior. Defaults to StandardLetter.

color.label: Color
color.description: Color used to render the letter icon and header text.

flashColor.label: Flash color
flashColor.description: Color used when the letter icon flashes in the message pane.

flashInterval.label: Flash interval
flashInterval.description: Interval in ticks between letter icon flashes.

bounce.label: Bounce
bounce.description: If true, the letter icon plays a bounce animation when it arrives.

arriveSound.label: Arrive sound
arriveSound.description: Sound played when this letter arrives. Falls back to LetterArrive if not set.

icon.label: Icon
icon.description: Texture path for the letter icon shown in the message pane.

pauseMode.label: Pause mode
pauseMode.description: When the game automatically pauses upon receiving this letter type.

forcedSlowdown.label: Forced slowdown
forcedSlowdown.description: If true, receiving this letter forces the game to slow to 1x speed.

basic-letter.label: Basic letter
basic-letter.description: Minimal letter type with a label and default display settings.
